note: Phase 3 particle-perf baseline (phase-3-vfx-particles.md WP-3.9, TASK-3.9.4/3.9.5). These are CONSERVATIVE DEFAULTS, not final tuned device budgets: real per-device-tier budget tuning is deferred to Phase 5 (handoff risk register R3.1). The gate (phase3-perf-gates.test.ts) reads this file as the single committed source of the caps/budget/tier thresholds, so a change to a perf bound is a reviewed edit to this committed artifact, not a magic number scattered across tests. maxLiveParticles mirrors runtime-core DEFAULT_MAX_LIVE_PARTICLES; the gate asserts they agree (drift guard).
